translations.en: The reform is coming next year.
translations.es: La reforma llega el próximo año.
translations.pt: A reforma começa no próximo ano.
translations.vi: Cải cách sẽ có hiệu lực vào năm sau.
translations.ar: ستدخل الإصلاحات حيز التنفيذ العام المقبل.
translations.nl: De hervorming gaat volgend jaar van start.
translations.pl: Reforma wejdzie w życie w przyszłym roku.
translations.el: Η μεταρρύθμιση θα τεθεί σε ισχύ του χρόνου.
translations.nb: Reformen trer i kraft neste år.
translations.sv: Reformen träder i kraft nästa år.
translations.ro: Reforma va intra în vigoare anul viitor.
translations.da: Reformen træder i kraft næste år.
translations.ja: 改革は来年始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; marks the subject noun 'Reform'.
Common noun (feminine), head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Die Reform'.
Attributive adjective with strong inflection (-es), modifying 'Jahr' in a temporal NP.
Common noun (neuter), head of the temporal adverbial NP 'nächstes Jahr'.

sentences.target: Wir diskutieren die Reform im Verein.

translations.de: Wir diskutieren die Reform im Verein.
translations.en: We are discussing the reform at the club.
translations.es: Estamos discutiendo la reforma en el club.
translations.fr: On discute de la réforme au club.
translations.it: Stiamo discutendo la riforma al circolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在俱乐部讨论这项改革。
translations.yue: 我哋喺社團度討論呢項改革。
translations.pt: Estamos discutindo a reforma no clube.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang bàn về cải cách ở câu lạc bộ.
translations.nl: We bespreken de hervorming in de vereniging.
translations.hi: हम क्लब में सुधार पर चर्चा कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang membahas reformasi di klub.
translations.ja: クラブで改革について話し合っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person plural; takes a direct object 'die Reform'.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of the direct object 'Reform'.
Common noun (feminine), direct object of 'diskutieren'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'), governs dative; introduces the PP 'im Verein'.
Common noun (masculine), dative singular as object of 'im'.

sentences.target: Meine Schule spürt die Auswirkungen der Reform bereits.

translations.de: Meine Schule spürt die Auswirkungen der Reform bereits.
translations.en: My school already feels the reform.
translations.es: Mi escuela ya siente los efectos de la reforma.
translations.fr: Mon école ressent déjà les effets de la réforme.
translations.it: La mia scuola risente già della riforma.
translations.ko: 우리 학교는 이미 개혁의 영향을 느끼고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的学校已经感受到改革的影响。
translations.yue: 我學校已經感受到改革嘅影響。
translations.ru: Моя школа уже ощущает влияние реформы.
translations.pt: Minha escola já sente os efeitos da reforma.
translations.he: בית הספר שלי כבר מרגיש את השפעת הרפורמה.
translations.vi: Trường tôi đã cảm nhận được tác động của cải cách.
translations.nl: Mijn school merkt de gevolgen van de hervorming al.
translations.uk: Моя школа вже відчуває наслідки реформи.
translations.hu: Az iskolám már érzi a reform hatását.
translations.hi: मेरे स्कूल को सुधार का असर पहले ही महसूस हो रहा है।
translations.pl: Moja szkoła już odczuwa skutki reformy.
translations.el: Το σχολείο μου ήδη νιώθει τις επιπτώσεις της μεταρρύθμισης.
translations.nb: Skolen min merker allerede effekten av reformen.
translations.id: Sekolah saya sudah merasakan dampak reformasi.
translations.sv: Min skola märker redan av reformens effekter.
translations.ro: Școala mea simte deja efectele reformei.
translations.cs: Moje škola už pociťuje dopady reformy.
translations.da: Min skole mærker allerede konsekvenserne af reformen.
translations.ja: 私の学校はもう改革の影響を感じています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, agrees with 'Schule' (feminine singular nominative).
Common noun (feminine), head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; takes 'die Auswirkungen' as its object.
Definite article, feminine plural accusative; determiner of the direct object 'Auswirkungen'.
Common noun (plural), direct object of 'spürt'.
Definite article, feminine singular genitive; marks the genitive attribute 'der Reform'.
Common noun (feminine), head of the genitive NP.
Temporal adverb indicating that the effect is already felt.

sentences.target: Ich warte seit Monaten auf die Reform.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə aʊ̯f diː ʁeˈfɔʁm zaɪ̯t ˈmoːnatən/

translations.de: Ich warte seit Monaten auf die Reform.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə zaɪ̯t ˈmoːnatən aʊ̯f diː ʁeˈfɔʁm/
translations.en: I've been waiting for the reform for months.
translations.fr: J'attends la réforme depuis des mois.
translations.ko: 나는 몇 달째 개혁을 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我已经等这项改革几个月了。
translations.yue: 我等呢個改革已經幾個月喇。
translations.ru: Я уже несколько месяцев жду реформу.
translations.pt: Estou esperando a reforma há meses.
translations.vi: Tôi đã chờ cải cách này suốt nhiều tháng.
translations.nl: Ik wacht al maanden op de hervorming.
translations.uk: Я чекаю на реформу вже місяцями.
translations.hu: Már hónapok óta várom a reformot.
translations.hi: मैं महीनों से सुधार का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Περιμένω τη μεταρρύθμιση εδώ και μήνες.
translations.nb: Jeg har ventet på reformen i månedsvis.
translations.id: Saya sudah menunggu reformasi selama berbulan-bulan.
translations.sv: Jag har väntat på reformen i månader.
translations.ro: Aștept reforma de luni de zile.
translations.da: Jeg har ventet på reformen i månedsvis.
translations.ja: 私は何か月も改革を待っています。
